PROJECTS.INFINITY_MATH.SUMMARY: A very basic private-lessons website built with HTML, CSS and JavaScript.
PROJECTS.INFINITY_MATH.DESCRIPTION: Infinity Math is a very basic private-lessons website built with HTML, CSS and JavaScript. The site has a home page, the lessons, the location and a contact form. It is responsive and looks good on mobile devices, and although it doesn't have real information, it's a good example of what a private-lessons website would look like. Deployed on Netlify.
